title: vernonia tortuosa
intro: Vernonia tortuosa, also known as the twisted ironweed, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves, roots, and stems. The health benefits of Vernonia tortuosa include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Vernonia tortuosa is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its dried leaves and roots are also used in traditional medicine, although further studies are needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
